## Summary

- What changed?
- Why did it change?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run build:vercel`
- [ ] Manual checks noted if automated coverage was not practical

## Docs and Risk

- [ ] Updated docs when architecture, workflow, or backlog changed
- [ ] No secrets or machine-local files added
- [ ] Risks or follow-ups called out clearly
